{{Quote|A vicious Zabrak admiral by the name of Grot. We have a small team of commandos available that will gas the building to drive the admiral out. I'm pretty sure that he will send his goons out first and not come out until he doesn't have a choice. So come prepared for a battle.|Captain Voldez|<ref name="SWG:TWB" />}}
'''Grot''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was one of the key commanders at the [[Battle of Restuss]] on [[Rori/Legends|Rori]]. After [[Restuss]]'s destruction, Grot was killed along with the [[Dark Trooper/Legends|Dark troopers]] that were guarding him by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Commando/Legends|commandos]] dispatched by Alliance [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Voldez]].<ref name="SWG:TWB" />

==Behind the scenes==
Grot appeared as a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:TWB" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Admiral Grot was added to the game along with the "[[W:c:swg:Battle of Restuss|Battle of Restuss]]" [[Wikipedia:Player versus player|PvP]] battlefield,<ref name="SWG:TWB" /> introduced in the "[[W:c:swg:Chapter 1.1|Chapter 1.1]]" released on [[June 27]], [[2006]].<ref name="SonyCite-Chapter Archive 2006">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64186&resource=publish|text=Chapter Archive 2006}}</ref>
